name: Oscar Health, Inc.
summary: PART I OUR BUSINESS Oscar is a leading healthcare technology company built around a full stack technology platform and a relentless focus on member experience. We offer health plans through the ACA serving individuals, families, and employees. We have been challenging the status quo in the healthcare system since our founding in 2012 and are dedicated to making a healthier life accessible and affordable for all.
